name: Deploy GitHub Pages green and verify vasudev.xyz online

description: Baseline local deploy readiness after resolving merge and removing Graphify graph

asi.hypothesis: A clean Hugo build with zero conflict markers and zero Graphify page/workflow references is ready to commit before pushing to GitHub Pages.
asi.local_checks: hugo --minify --gc passed, no unmerged files, no conflict markers, no blocked Graphify refs.

description: Attempted custom push command while autoresearch.sh gate was active

asi.hypothesis: Push and workflow monitoring can be treated as the deployment experiment, but the harness requires the command to be routed through autoresearch.sh when it exists.
asi.rollback_reason: No code change to keep. The run was rejected by the autoresearch harness before executing git push.
asi.next_action_hint: Update autoresearch.sh to support DEPLOY_REMOTE=1 mode, then run ./autoresearch.sh via run_experiment.

description: Remote deploy monitor selected a stale pre-fix workflow run

asi.hypothesis: Pushing current master then watching the latest deploy workflow should verify GitHub Pages, but the run selector must bind to the current HEAD SHA rather than any latest branch run.
asi.rollback_reason: The deployment check failed because it watched an older run that still contained the removed Graphify step, not because the current code failed.
asi.next_action_hint: Update autoresearch.sh to capture git rev-parse HEAD and select the Deploy to GitHub Pages run whose headSha matches it.

description: Watched current HEAD deploy workflow and verified live site HTTP 200

asi.hypothesis: Binding the workflow watcher to the current HEAD SHA avoids stale failed runs and correctly verifies the pushed deployment.
